title: bixaceae
intro: The bixaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a small family that consists of around 5 genera, primarily found in tropical regions of Asia and South America. The bixa family is characterized by its unique, often fragrant flowers and includes several species of plants that are valued for their medicinal and ornamental properties. Some species within the bixaceae family are also known for producing valuable plant-based dyes and pigments.
